source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260213 태국 MD Healthcard Co., Ltd/260327 추가보완서류/1.1 [Portable X-ray system] DoC, LoA/4 Safety Declaration 251209.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Safety declaration for Portable X-ray System model Hnx-PB submitted for medical device registration to the Thai Food and Drug Administration.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Applicant declaration for registration of the stated medical device with the Medical Devices Control Division.
keyPoints: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no global safety issues associated with intended use in the last one year from 09 December 2025.
The declaration states no reported deaths and no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.
The declaration states no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at the point of submission.
The applicant acknowledges false declarations may be an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2008), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

evidence.claim: The declared medical device product name is Portable X-ray System.
The declared model name is Hnx-PB.
H&abyz Co., Ltd. is the applicant for registration of the stated medical device.
evidence.evidenceText: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the applicant for registration of the medical device( s) stated below

evidence.claim: The applicant declares there are no global safety issues associated with intended use in the last one year from 09 December 2025.
evidence.evidenceText: declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device( s) when used as intended by the Product Owner, in the last one year from 09 December 2025.

evidence.claim: The declaration states no reported deaths.
The declaration states no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.
evidence.evidenceText: ( √) No reported serious deterioration in the state of health 1 of any person;
evidence.pageTarget: Serious deterioration in the state of health

evidence.claim: The declaration states no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at the point of submission.
evidence.evidenceText: ( √) No open field safety corrective actions ( including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The applicant acknowledges false declarations may be an offence under named Medical Device Acts and applicable laws.
evidence.evidenceText: I, the applicant, am aware that making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2008), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562) and other applicable laws

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with registration conditions issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration may result in suspension or cancellation of registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.

evidence.claim: The signatory is Yunhee KIM, CEO of H&abyz Co., Ltd.

reviewFlags.reason: No revision or version is present in the source text.
